title: AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF INABANGA, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO BE KNOWN AS PUYAT EMERGENCY HOSPITAL AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2323 / 68 OG No. 52, 10251 (December 25, 1972)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6577, September 30, 1972 ]

AN ACT ESTABLISHING AN EMERGENCY HOSPITAL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF INABANGA, PROVINCE OF BOHOL, TO BE KNOWN AS PUYAT EMERGENCY HOSPITAL AND AUTHORIZING THE APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS THEREFOR.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. There shall be established under the direct supervision of the Director of Medical Services, an emergency hospital in the Municipality of Inabanga, Province of Bohol, to be known as Puyat Emergency Hospital.

SEC. 2. The sum of three hundred thousand pesos is hereby authorized to be appropriated, out of any funds in the National Treasury not otherwise appropriated, for the establishment, operation and maintenance of said hospital during the fiscal year nineteen hundred seventy-two. Thereafter, such sums as may be necessary for its operation and maintenance shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC.3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval

Enacted without executive approval, September 30, 1972.
